issue_summary: adding k-nearestneighbor classifier (based on mlt), improving testing by abstracting a basetest class, added ngram test for simplenaivebayes, changed build.xml to incorporate queries and analyzer-common deps
code_before: public String assignClass(String text) throws IOException;
code_after: public ClassificationResult assignClass(String text) throws IOException;
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Assign a class to the given text String
   * @param text a String containing text to be classified
   * @return a String representing a class
   * @throws IOException If there is a low-level I/O error.
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Assign a class (with score) to the given text String
   * @param text a String containing text to be classified
   * @return a {@link ClassificationResult} holding assigned class and score
   * @throws IOException If there is a low-level I/O error.
   */
